frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver grasping needle at proximal third, left grasper holding suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle appears to be held too proximally for optimal control

frame_analyses.description: Needle being driven through first mark on Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry appears close to mark but angle is difficult to assess

frame_analyses.description: Needle passing through second mark, completing suture placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Exit point appears reasonably accurate to mark

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot - right hand leading double throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper surgeon's knot technique with double wrap

frame_analyses.description: Completing first throw with appropriate tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good approximation of drain edges, knot appears secure

frame_analyses.description: Left hand leading single throw in opposite direction
Right hand leading final single throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completing three-throw sequence with hand alternation

frame_analyses.description: Cutting both suture tails with scissors inside trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate tail length maintained, cut performed intracorporeally

penalties.description: Entry point appears approximately 1.5mm lateral to mark 1

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double wrap, good tension
Single throw in opposite direction, proper hand alternation
Final single throw completing three-throw sequence

confidence_rationale: Task completion and timing clearly visible. Knot sequence well-observed with proper hand switching. Some uncertainty in exact suture deviation measurements due to camera angle limitations.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation measurements - camera angle provides oblique view of marks
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient timing (75s vs 80-120s expert benchmark). Proper three-throw sequence with correct hand alternation. Minor suture placement deviation only penalty.
strengths: Fast completion time in expert range
Correct surgeon's knot followed by alternating single throws
Proper hand switching between all throws
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise needle entry at marked points
Consider needle grasp position closer to tip for better control
